nepa_description__c: Sam Uhler and David Smith propose a 5-10 year placer gold mining operation on 15 acres of BLM-administered land adjacent to Jordan Creek in Owyhee County Idaho. The plan includes a seasonal mining window (March 1 - November 30) use of the existing 1.7-mile two-track access road a 50-foot Jordan Creek buffer silt fencing and full reclamation bonded to BLM botanist approval. Water withdrawal from Jordan Creek requires separate IDWR permit. Suction dredge requires EPA NPDES General Permit IDG370000.
nepa_purpose_need__c: Authorize placer gold mining on 15 acres of BLM-administered land in Owyhee County Idaho to provide economic benefit to the proponent consistent with FLPMA multiple-use principles.
nepa_process_outcome__c: FONSI issued. No significant impact found. CWA 404 and IDWR appropriation permits required prior to ground disturbance.
